entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to late leaf spot disease.

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A fungal disease that affects groundnut plants.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental temperature ranging from 15 to 35 degrees Celsius affecting disease development.

entities.name: LEAF WETNESS PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of leaf wetness ranging from 4 to 24 hours affecting disease development.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to resist late leaf spot infection.

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which groundnut genotypes are prone to late leaf spot infection.

entities.name: DISEASE SEVERITY
entities.description: The measure of the extent of late leaf spot infection on the plant.

entities.name: SCREENING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to identify and evaluate groundnut genotypes for disease resistance.

entities.name: DISEASE PREDICTION MODELS
entities.description: Models used to forecast the development of late leaf spot disease.

entities.name: DEFOLIATION
entities.description: The loss of leaves as a symptom of late leaf spot infection.

relationships.description: Affects the development and progress of the disease
Affects the severity and development of the disease
Causes infection and disease in the crop

Genotypes exhibit varying levels of this trait to LLS
